He played at club level for the [[Otahuhu Leopards]] (junior), [[Canterbury-Bankstown Bulldogs|Canterbury Bulldogs]], [[Sydney Roosters]], [[Eastern Suburbs Tigers|Easts Tigers]], [[South Sydney Rabbitohs]], [[Leigh Centurions]], [[Wynnum Manly Seagulls|Wynnum Manly]] in the [[Queensland Cup]], [[Whitehaven R.L.F.C.|Whitehaven]], [[Castleford Tigers]] and the [[Norths Devils]] in the [[Queensland Cup]].{{cite web|url=http://www.thecastlefordtigers.co.uk/alltime.php|title=Castleford RLFC A to Z Player List (All Time)|date=31 December 2017|access-date=1 January 2018|url-status=dead|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20120216084010/http://www.thecastlefordtigers.co.uk/alltime.php|archive-date=16 February 2012}}{{cite career=== Vaiao played for [[Samoa national rugby league team|Samoa]] at the [[2000 Rugby League World Cup|2000 World Cup]], he was named in the [[Samoa national rugby league team#2008 World Cup squad|Samoa training squad]] for the [[2008 Rugby League World Cup|2008 World Cup]] but did not make the final side.{{cite web|url=http://www.leagueunlimited.com/article.php?newsid=16750 |title=Samoa
